channel.title: SICO on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in SICO on Tech Tracker

item.title: SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-p9qTWsSDeig/YE93Jv_5SCI/AAAAAAAADio/wx0XF8nApb09wOnaMvn3oa0ltWpXbIsyACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1615820576073020-0.png" alt="SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!" title="SICO™ - A new battle royale game from indian developers on Android!"> New battle royale games are on rage these days in india, every new week one new bat- tle royale game can be seen as Pub-G was banned and atma Nirbhar Bharat Program is inspiring and motivating many talented young developers to make amazing world class apps and games that can compete with global companies.
